name: 0n AutoResponder
description: AI-powered auto-responses for CRM conversations using 0nMCP. Automatically replies to inbound messages with intelligent, context-aware responses powered by Claude.
author: RocketOpp LLC

reply_delay_seconds.description: Seconds to wait before sending auto-reply

keyword_triggers.description: Only auto-reply when message contains one of these keywords (empty = reply to all)

system_prompt.default: You are a helpful business assistant. Answer questions concisely and professionally. If you cannot help, let the customer know a team member will follow up shortly.
system_prompt.description: System prompt for the AI responder
